content:
You can play with it here.
It uses excalidraw as a sandbox editor, simulates solids, fluids, gases, simple
thermodynamics, reactions, and more... Check the repo for full feature list.
All the physics information is stored as metadata in excalidraw scenes, so you can save/load/share scenes. There are some prefabs in the library too.
Let me know if you have any suggestions or issues. I'm working on a more in-depth post for more technically inclined. It's still work-in-progress so not everything is properly tuned and issues can arise. Also it's not really tested for performance besides my pc.

  submitted by   /u/kostrubaty
[link]   [comments]
